title: Why Wrexham's global fanbase is about more than fame and glory
summary: Wrexham's appeal extends well beyond famous ownership and on-pitch success, drawing a substantial international fanbase. The article explores the deeper factors attracting global football fans to the Welsh club.
content: They have famous owners and have been successful on and off the pitch, but what else is attracting football fans worldwide to Wrexham?

zh.title: 为什么雷克瑟姆的全球粉丝基础不仅仅关乎名气和荣耀
zh.summary: 雷克瑟姆的吸引力远远超越名人所有权和赛场成功，吸引了大量国际粉丝。本文探讨了吸引全球足球迷关注这支威尔士俱乐部的更深层因素。

title: FPL talking point: Six key players for blank gameweek 34
summary: With six Premier League clubs facing a blank gameweek in Fantasy Premier League round 34, the article recommends key alternative players fantasy managers should consider for their lineups.
content: With six clubs falling victim to a blank Fantasy Premier League gameweek, here are some players to consider turning to.

zh.title: FPL讨论点：第34空白周期的六名关键球员
zh.summary: 由于六支英超俱乐部在梦幻超级联赛第34轮面临空白周期，本文推荐了梦幻经理应该在阵容中考虑的关键替补球员。

title: Who will win title? The big prediction special
summary: BBC Sport assembles predictions from pundits, reporters, and fans on remaining Premier League fixtures and the title race between Manchester City and Arsenal, determining who will ultimately win the league.
content: Will it be Manchester City or Arsenal for the Premier League title? BBC Sport gets pundits, reporters and fans to predict each of their remaining fixtures - and who will win the league.

zh.title: 谁将赢得冠军？大预测特别版
zh.summary: BBC体育汇集了专家、记者和球迷对英超剩余比赛和曼城与阿森纳之间冠军争夺的预测，以确定谁最终将赢得英超。

title: Gibbs-White's month to prove World Cup worth
summary: Nottingham Forest's Morgan Gibbs-White was excluded from England's 35-man World Cup squad but remains in contention; his current strong form provides a limited opportunity to impress selector Thomas Tuchel before final selection.
content: Morgan Gibbs-White has hit form at the right time with Nottingham Forest - but did not make Thomas Tuchel's 35-man England squad last month. If he is to make it to the World Cup, time is tight.

zh.title: 吉布斯-怀特需要一个月证明自己的世界杯价值
zh.summary: 诺丁汉森林的摩根·吉布斯-怀特被排除在英格兰35人世界杯大名单之外，但仍有希望入选；他目前的强势表现为他提供了有限的机会在最终选拔前给选拔官托马斯·图赫尔留下印象。

title: 'I try to stay happy' - Trafford on tricky start to life at Man City
summary: Manchester City goalkeeper James Trafford discusses his difficult adjustment since joining the club, acknowledging disappointing results and challenging circumstances in his early months.
content: Manchester City goalkeeper James Trafford says he has not had "the best possible outcome" since joining the club.

zh.title: "我尽力保持快乐" - 特拉福德谈曼城生活的困难开局
zh.summary: 曼城门将詹姆斯·特拉福德讨论了自加入球队以来的艰难适应，认可了他早期几个月中令人失望的成绩和具有挑战性的环境。

title: Season has been big learning experience - Trafford
summary: James Trafford reflects on his challenging first season at Manchester City, describing it as a significant learning experience while acknowledging the move has not met expectations.
content: Goalkeeper James Trafford says this season has been a "big learning experience" and his move to Manchester City "hasn't been the best possible outcome".

zh.title: 赛季是一次重大学习经历 - 特拉福德
zh.summary: 詹姆斯·特拉福德反思他在曼城的艰难首个赛季，将其描述为一次重大学习经历，同时承认这次转会没有达到预期。
